introduction: This presentation analyses the recent industry events attended by our team and the strategic market intelligence gathered from them. Our focus will be on understanding the evolving trends and potential opportunities in the electric vehicle industry.

subsections.heading: Overview of Attended Industry Events
subsections.content:
• Elexion has attended 15 key industry events in the past year
• Participated in the International Electric Vehicle Symposium in March 2025
• Joined the World EV Show in Toronto, May 2025, showcasing our latest EV model
• Attended the Silicon Valley Auto Show, June 2025, focused on technology integration
• Participated in the LA Auto Show in November 2024, where we launched our new SUV model
• Planning to attend the Beijing International Automotive Exhibition in April 2026
subsections.justification: The content discusses various industry events but does not mention the specific event Emily Lee attended for market intelligence. The distractor strategy used focuses on general industry participation.

subsections.heading: Key Market Insights from Event Participation
subsections.content:
• Identified a growing trend towards autonomous driving technologies
• Noted a 30% increase in customer interest in vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology
• Discovered a rising demand for luxury EVs with extended mileage
• Observed a trend of integrating AI-based functionalities in EVs
• Uncovered a competitive strategy focusing on fast-charging solutions
• Found an increasing trend in cross-border collaborations for EV manufacturing
subsections.justification: The content discusses general market insights from various events, but does not specify which insights Emily Lee gathered from her event. The distractor strategy focuses on general insights.

subsections.heading: Future Industry Events and Strategic Planning
subsections.content:
• Targeting the Geneva International Motor Show in March 2026 for revealing our next EV model
• Planning to attend the Battery Show North America in September 2026 for technological advancements
• Evaluating the participation in the Tokyo Motor Show in October 2026 to explore Asian markets
• Considering the Auto Shanghai 2027 for expanding our presence in China
• Identifying potential partners for collaboration at the Frankfurt Motor Show in September 2026
subsections.justification: This content outlines future industry events and strategic planning but does not provide information on the event Emily Lee attended. The distractor strategy focuses on future plans.

conclusion: Attending industry events has proven to be a valuable strategy for gathering market intelligence. Moving forward, we should prioritize these opportunities to stay abreast of technological advancements and market trends in the electric vehicle industry.
